---
title: Popovers
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/display-messages/popovers/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/display-messages/popovers/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-core.py
    height: 200
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhXER0AVwpFhEACZwGRBZwA6EfQHdOFdsh05SUgG6aAFJzUBeXWABGFCAH0pNza6IKEwAbOBcwAAUrUlsGZAAVELgA5HRgqGI4eEpwhk4Ac3YKVwBKFGQAYmQAHmr9ZAbzTixuRQovDKDyLzclCnI7Vw8DQmRXAGFgzmIAa2Q6aVTo2NKGqtr6xtcAQSW-OKEYxxFkKDU1E05yKGDkMkoBWSh1OSoGTs5bZDhQ7IpWLCuNY1OoGMEAAVUGgYWCo-GK6jgdGQwx8y00XlYFCgVDsZU2DWEFAUDAg81cUX2yCs1DY2KoKBArSUWFRvhi9hKAF8gZUQfpRmAKLh0AgUELHmAuQBdIA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkAQUxEG1ACZwGRAK6cAOhFUZ0AfSXIAvMiU4oAczia6AGyXSAFKuQODnHKUEA3OTYcBiZAB4-e0dgw250BQpNKGIKTnJNACMIinI7MASKNUJkZTAAYQtOYgBrZDohZEF3OVyASiJkXwCg4Idc0UrXUg8GSqY3TllWZChpaU5Y8igLZDJKOAAPESgIaT55hmjYj2Q4Czh4SlYsXIamwIhWx1iKfd1cgAUunuQAFQn9059-C6uHQfu6Uymiq3Rq2UaPxarXQFmiB2oFEBDE4xnYFC+kOal0c9W+2JCzlIEXCkSoS00PQSUFiMDS5IxYHqqlqqjZqzgdDYch6NjCESIxIopKIrDgrFYcQgtUQ0IAAlIOQwsAzobIuQybDLocEpBQFAxLnRHs85MhXNQ2BQaXAUCB+RQsBkICDTQwtQBfXL4i7sjR6MSYGwabScUU8uSsiDZMAUXDoBAoWOLChgD0AXSAA
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/display-messages/popovers/
  contents:
  - title: ui.popover
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/core/ui.popover.html
    signature: ui.popover(trigger, *args, title=None, id=None, placement='auto', options=None,
      **kwargs)
  - title: express.ui.popover
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/express/express.ui.popover.html
    signature: express.ui.popover(*args, title=None, id=None, placement='auto', options=None,
      **kwargs)
  - title: ui.update_popover
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/core/ui.update_popover.html
    signature: ui.update_popover(id, *args, title=None, show=None, session=None)
- id: variations
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/display-messages/popovers/
  contents:
  - title: Update a popover message
    description: Call `ui.update_popover()` to toggle or change the state of a popover
      with a given id.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-update-popover-core.py
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-update-popover-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkDOFGIVOANzgAdCI2ZsuPLHAAe6Ma1Z8BQkd3QBXCkROcFCy1mNmA+hKnkHAIzMVyACjlg3FBAOHKQA7n5EfgDK7GHIgoKyDBHIxAA2ULoOALx+MBQAtADMyPDFfgCUNpx2EKYUTpKcrh4UXhC+-oEO6aSs8oTIfgDCaX1w8aSJcMmD6ZmsOXmFJWVFldYQoZwU7Mi2CaRJ3pwAJrlgh0kOZylSFGlwFwAiuNAwnMTIAApTRzOVRAKZAg-Y1ewNZzNIKtdqdAJBUIOK4AwZ+ACCyFh5GQ212yCgk2msyI8yyF3y5TAVQgoKGYEx8F0UAA5hNuKwzhNdhMUbNNgoAAJiKGydR0OhwSRCkVNMVwWSUE51MxYBHBWKhGmnOB0ZAObwVIG00G2EzoU5QKjIv7HPx8m6nFIhULZAAqDBMcAqIIAxMgADwBgUQYXiOVwcWS6Wh2VSeWKijK+pq7q9fra3X6w3Gulmi1WuA24mdB23QYu7IAMSgaQzfsDwYggzAFFw6AQKFbmgoYAAvgBdIA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-update-popover-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkAQUxEAkhHQBXCqyIB5eXIVEAynFatO5IgzhRiFTgDc4RWZwA6EOxnQB9a8gC8yazigBzOE7oAG2sAEwAKO2Qoz04sbjUnY1NyJwAjeQpyCLBUiggnDlIAdxtCZFKNdmLkQUELBlKiYkCoHSc3UpgKAFoAZmR4PtKASgJI6K94+USTPXz0ikyIbNz85tJWOEbysABhQI24GtI6uAay5tbWds6e--HU5n9l-jncYiYGEjguJwgZOmcZZlGAFC4OgCAoDBcAAB4UGAAC+AC6QA
- id: kitchen-sink
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-kitchen-sink.ejs
  contents:
  - title: popover
    core: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-ytmi1sPMyT8GsuWLUsGWIA9KybDlr0eMAhyUV46HjK9CwtTIABk4DQv8uX7VhZXrEYHAgbgdAIolJ2nXU5wNI1kBBE0sQw1sAKwoINwdcgnREF03XIT1kHIE9-VQihL1XC1bynHC8JEKJP2WaiKg-WM00ySS1LuGTWlzHiC1bCC6SgmDWTgsDW3rJRlR0dh0P0mywAAJS2RzdNaIiSKQhVWEkYhYkaLyalozIZz1RjF1Ndja04m1uPzLc+J3QSDxEsS-WQezHOkhDyjkrV3IcpSUzjULrA0l8KC1XKnIKy1nOsBKrSyOQOogXw6DYPxyTMGk6SIUg6VLIhWDgRp3SyRBqi+EL5EWxR1DETAzEUFROHGvq-HaiBCFQChcHQBAUDAKhegoMA8QAXSAA
    express: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-3uTw84IpyXJXO5Xlh8IK5CokSkrA08QgcAMyCgsk0cGQxKwepURvykOsUj8riMiORYAAQt9fhjQgTKLj0PjsZKo8xSfrtlSIDS6Qz7czWeQOcb8jy+czUzAhRHK6KiqxSmWptw6KQFbsw6qpupNextYDvSXQRnS6ag4s+lbZDa7eRHc7XY5kF8fswvWBlCP-dDA3Dg6HlR4ADJwOiyYKx7EJpOEjw1M-p32crM5+nERn8lmr9kjzlNuz3jihAmieD7AWKEpNo0+gQNw4ztkqKpqj2WrIDcOpAhuT4Gr+VgeN444Wv01qkLaH7zuQHpLoB66bthljbjou7wiGGhhgAShM7Dnje8bAYml63mADBcUBYL0ZSOjUrSb4fgW37FkOlj-iJ4zcdWnFqUBRAQQ2kp8hUrByMQYSiAhnbIRqqHoQOWFDoaQ74WaASTgMLykbODpOpRbrIKp3G0RAwFgLs6AICgIUCBQYAAL4ALpAA
    image: thumbnail.png
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A popover is a popup box that appears next to a trigger element when the user clicks or toggles it. Popovers provide a persistent, overlay container that can hold rich content such as explanatory text, input controls, or complex UI elements.

To add a popover in Shiny Core, pass the target trigger element as the first argument to [`ui.popover()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/core/ui.popover.html), followed by the popover contents. In Shiny Express, use the [`with ui.popover():`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/express/express.ui.popover.html) context manager, placing the trigger element inside the context block along with the popover contents.

### Popover vs. Tooltip

While [tooltips](../tooltips/index.qmd) are lightweight overlay boxes designed for brief hover text, popovers are larger, interactive containers designed to contain detailed context, input fields, or multi-element controls. Popovers open on interaction (click) and remain open until dismissed.

### Placement and Title

- **Placement**: Control where the popover appears relative to its trigger via the `placement` argument (`'auto'`, `'top'`, `'bottom'`, `'left'`, or `'right'`).
- **Title**: Optional heading content displayed at the top of the popover box using the `title` parameter.
- **Server Reactions**: If an `id` is provided, the open state of the popover is accessible on the server as `input.<id>()` as a boolean (`True` when visible, `False` when hidden).

### Updating Popovers

Use [`ui.update_popover()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/core/ui.update_popover.html) on the server side to programmatically show or hide a popover with a specific `id` by setting `show=True` or `show=False`.

See Also: [Tooltips](../tooltips/index.qmd) for simple hover messages, [Modal messages](../modal/index.qmd) for modal dialog overlays, and [Cards](../../layout/cards/index.qmd) for layout containers.

## Variations

:::{#variations}
:::

:::{#kitchen-sink}
:::
